<ueab:ExcelApplicationCard ReadFormatting="{x:Null}" SensitivityLabel="{x:Null}" WorkbookPath="{x:Null}" ResizeWindow="None" SensitivityOperation="None">

</ueab:ExcelApplicationCard>
